doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066
label: partial
reason: The document cites real laws and cases but misrepresents the Jones v. DeSantis ruling, which actually struck down Florida's requirement to pay fines/restitution before voting, making the LFOs section legally inaccurate.
